productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Light Work Navy Blue Shirts
description: CompositionNavy blue and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, with 3/4th sleeves, assymetric panels on the sides, full buttoned placket and cuffs, button detailing at mid-sleeve level, contrast panel on inseam of the collar, black stitch detailing, godets on the side hems and curved hemline  FittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash in cold water Use mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron Get back to the basics with this blue and white check shirt from scullers. The contoured seams and 3/4th sleeves makes this shirt a great choice for everyday wear. Team this with denims, brown leather boots and chunky silver jewellery for a really cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
